calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-24-2008 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted
Off Calendar Dec-17-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance stated. Plaintiff The Best Service Co. Inc.'s Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied as there is no declaration setting forth the amount of any monetary sanction. [C.C.P. Section 2023.040]. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2007 Set For Trial On Jan-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
